channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Repeat obstruction of highway with private cones - AVF Construction, 17th April
item.description:
Two cones have been placed on the public carriageway on Lubbock Road, in the same area as our earlier FixMyStreet report: 9243828. This photo was taken at 23:18 on 17 April 2026. The cones are being repeatedly used by the AVF Beechbrook construction site to prevent the lawful use of residents’ parking on the public highway outside their homes. Please investigate, arrange their removal, and take enforcement action against the AVF construction site. If it would assist enforcement, we can ask for CCTV footage showing who placed them there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accumulated household rubbish and waste outside 10 Kashgar Road, SE18 1HW — attracting rats, 17th April
item.description:
Bags of household rubbish and loose waste have been building up outside the front of 10 Kashgar Road for several months. The waste is not being properly contained or cleared on collection days and continues to accumulate. It is now attracting rats and insects, which have spread to neighbouring properties including my own home. Please could the area be inspected and the waste cleared. I would also be grateful if this could be referred to Environmental Health as a possible statutory nuisance under the Environmental Protection Act 1990, given the impact of vermin on adjoining properties. This property is also the subject of an active HMO investigation by Royal Borough of Greenwich (case ref 2946183). The accumulation of waste appears consistent with overcrowding at the address.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light nor working, 17th April
item.description:
Street lamp off
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Ash Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover is loose, making a sound every time a car drives over it, 17th April
item.description:
There’s a manhole cover on the road, which has come loose - every time a vehicle drives over it it makes a loud sound as it moves underneath the wheels. This has started in the past week. It’s right outside the Funeral Directors, on their side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-72, Honor Oak Park, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned green Lime hire bicycle in the pedestrian passageway at the very end of Victor Rd cul de sac, Penge., 17th April
item.description:
Abandoned green Lime hire bicycle in the pedestrian passageway at the very end of Victor Rd cul de sac, Penge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victor Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle full of mould, 17th April
item.description:
Vehicle has been there for years and is completely full of mould on the interiors. It is abandoned and taking a parking space in an area that is always busy for spaces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Blenheim Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Parking bollard has been knocked over, 17th April
item.description:
Parking bollard has been knocked by a vehicle reversing off drive. This is becoming very regular occurrence. The bollard has been removed and placed on the pavement causing a trip/accident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Lewis Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 17th April
item.description:
Yet again the street light outside 202 Green Lane is not working. Previously reported and claimed to have been fixed but there’s obviously an ongoing problem with it as it stops working every few weeks. This is a security issue for the houses in the vicinity as this part of Green Lane is in complete darkness
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 17th April
item.description:
Graffiti tags all over fence next to new flats

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement is cracked and has a hole in it and us a big tripping hazard, 17th April
item.description:
Pavement is cracked and has a hole in it and us a big tripping hazard - it has been like this for a few months atleast

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out AGAIN, 17th April
item.description:
This light keeps going out please sort this out once and for all. Fed up with it going out. It’s dangerous. Last time my husband nearly reversed into someone on the pavement!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing utiliities / Manhole cover, 17th April
item.description:
Outside 72 herbert road there is a missing utilities cover. This is a serious tripping hazard. Not sure what company owns this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cable run across pavement, 17th April
item.description:
Car Charging cable running across the pavement in busy shopping street. This is here on a daily basis and runs from the first floor window. When not in use it is left behind an old piece of wood. This street is busy with elderly and less mobile people regularly having to cross this cable to get to the chemist and post office which are nearby,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These potholes are a hazard to motorcycles . I drive a motorcycle and the size of these holes are dangerous the human life it is outrageous that they have not been fixed. Bromley you are playing with human life!!!!, 17th April
item.description:
These are dangerous to cyclists and motorcyclists car drivers and humans It’s outrageous that they are not filled in. A motorcycle front wheel in one of these can cause you tibia into on owning traffic . Bromley your playing with people’s lives for a small filling of tarmac!!!!! Anerly road opposite Tescos se19

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Frequent dog poos and littering, 17th April
item.description:
Frequent dog poos and bad littering most of them being dangerous for children. Please bring in either a fine system or frequent checks. It’s disgusting and causes serious harm to children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nunhead Green, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
